oligos.name: Barcoded bead capture/PCR oligo
oligos.role: Clonal bead-borne primer that adds the droplet (cell) barcode to the Read-1 end of transposed fragments during droplet PCR

components.name: Phase block
components.role: Phasing/diversity spacer, 0-4 nt (none / A / CG / GCC / NVGC)

components.name: Constant 1
components.role: Fixed linker between BC1 and BC2

components.name: Constant 2
components.role: Fixed linker between BC2 and BC3

components.name: Nextera Read 1
components.role: s5/Nextera Read-1 sequence; 3' end anneals to the Tn5 Read-1 adapter on the fragment

oligos.notes: The three 7-mer barcode segments plus the two constant linkers form the droplet/cell barcode read on Read 1. bap assigns each constitutive element to the closest known sequence allowing up to one mismatch per 6/7-mer.

oligos.name: Bead linker constant 1
oligos.role: Fixed sequence between bead barcode segments BC1 and BC2

oligos.name: Bead linker constant 2
oligos.role: Fixed sequence between bead barcode segments BC2 and BC3

oligos.name: Nextera Read 1 (s5)
oligos.role: Read-1 partial adapter appended by Tn5 / carried at 3' of bead oligo; Read-1 sequencing sub-sequence

oligos.name: Mosaic end (ME)
oligos.role: 19-bp Tn5 mosaic-end transferred strand adjacent to the genomic insert

oligos.name: Mosaic-end complement (pMENT)
oligos.role: Non-transferred mosaic-end complementary oligo that forms the Tn5 transposome duplex
oligos.notes: Listed as /5Phos/CTGTCTCTTATACA/3ddC/ (15-nt mosaic-end complement: 5'-phosphorylated, 3' dideoxy-C blocked).

oligos.name: Nextera Read 2 adapter (s7 + ME)
oligos.role: Read-2 adapter loaded on the second Tn5 end; Read-2 sequencing primer

components.name: Mosaic end
components.role: Tn5 mosaic end adjacent to genomic insert

oligos.name: Tn5 Read-2 transposome (s7 end)
oligos.role: Assembled Tn5 transposome loaded with the Nextera Read-2 adapter (used on both dsc and dsci ends)

oligos.name: Indexed Nextera Read 1 adapter (Tn5 barcode)
oligos.role: dsciATAC-seq: Nextera Read-1 adapter modified to carry a 6-nt well/sample (Tn5) barcode for combinatorial indexing
oligos.notes: 96 barcodes (Supplementary Table 6). Examples: oligo 1 = AAAGAA -> TCGTCGGCAGCGTCAAAGAAAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG; oligo 96 = TTTGGG -> TCGTCGGCAGCGTCTTTGGGAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG. Annealed with Nextera Read 2 adapter and ME complement at a 1:1:2 molar ratio (read1:read2:ME-complement) and loaded onto purified Tn5. Standard dscATAC-seq omits this barcode (plain TCGTCGGCAGCGTCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG).

oligos.name: Indexed Tn5 Read-1 transposome (dsci)
oligos.role: Assembled barcoded Tn5 transposome adding the well-specific Read-1 barcode during tagmentation

oligos.name: SureCell ATAC i7 index primer (N7xx)
oligos.role: P7 library/index primer adding the 8-nt i7 sample index and P7 during the final amplification

components.name: s7 / Nextera Read 2
components.role: Anneals to the Read-2 (s7) end of the fragment

oligos.notes: 24 indices provided (SureCell ATAC-Seq Index Kit): N701 TCGCCTTA, N702 CTAGTACG, N703 TTCTGCCT, N704 GCTCAGGA, N705 AGGAGTCC, N706 CATGCCTA, N707 GTAGAGAG, N710 CAGCCTCG, N711 TGCCTCTT, N712 TCCTCTAC, N714 TCATGAGC, N715 CCTGAGAT, N716 TAGCGAGT, N718 GTAGCTCC, N719 TACTACGC, N720 AGGCTCCG, N721 GCAGCGTA, N722 CTGCGCAT, N723 GAGCGCTA, N724 CGCTCAGT, N726 GTCTTAGG, N727 ACTGATCG, N728 TAGCTGCA, N729 GACGTCGA.

oligos.name: P7 flow-cell adapter
oligos.role: P7 grafting sequence (5' constant of the i7 index primer)

oligos.name: Custom Read 1 sequencing primer (SureCell)
oligos.role: Custom primer required for Read 1; anneals immediately 5' of the bead barcode
oligos.notes: Part of the SureCell ATAC-Seq Library Prep Kit; exact sequence is proprietary and not disclosed in the documents. Required for Read 1 on the NextSeq.

oligos.name: Random-oligonucleotide bead-merge validation spike-in (Table S6)
oligos.role: Exogenous droplet-PCR template with a 14-nt random region, spiked in to define true-positive bead pairs for the BAP bead-merging validation

components.name: Constant region
components.role: 15-bp constant preceding the random region (used to locate/parse it)

components.name: Nextera Read 1 (rev-comp)
components.role: Reverse complement of TCGTCGGCAGCGTC, so bead primer can barcode it

oligos.notes: Spiked at 5 nM after tagmentation; reads parsed by finding the 15-bp constant then the 14 downstream bases.

final_library.source_label: dscATAC-seq / ddSEQ SureCell ATAC-Seq final library (P5 -> P7 top strand)
final_library.annotated_library_sequence: [P5] [CELL_BARCODE:7](BC1) [SPACER](phase 0-4) TATGCATGAC [CELL_BARCODE:7](BC2) AGTCACTGAG [CELL_BARCODE:7](BC3) TCGTCGGCAGCGTC(Read1) AGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG(ME) [CDNA](genomic) CTGTCTCTTATACACATCT(ME') CCGAGCCCACGAGAC(Read2') [SAMPLE_INDEX:8](i7') ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG(P7')
annotation_lines: [P5] — Illumina P5 flow-cell adapter (exact sequence not disclosed in documents); custom SureCell Read 1 primer binds just 3' of this
[SPACER] — phase block, 0-4 nt (none / A / CG / GCC / NVGC)
dsciATAC-seq variant inserts a 6-nt Tn5 well barcode between TCGTCGGCAGCGTC and AGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG

evidence.locator: dscATAC-seq / ddSEQ SureCell ATAC-Seq final library (P5 -> P7 top strand)

library_generation.title: Tn5 tagmentation of open chromatin
library_generation.summary: Intact nuclei are tagmented with Tn5 transposase to insert Nextera Read-1 and Read-2 adapters into accessible chromatin.
library_generation.note: Omni-ATAC-based lysis/tagmentation (0.1% NP-40/Tween-20, 0.01% digitonin) with concentrated Tn5 from the SureCell kit. In dsciATAC-seq the Read-1 adapter carries a 6-nt well-specific Tn5 barcode (96 barcodes) for combinatorial indexing before pooling.

library_generation.title: Droplet encapsulation with barcoded beads
library_generation.summary: Tagmented nuclei are co-encapsulated with PCR mix and barcoded beads on the ddSEQ Single-Cell Isolator.
library_generation.note: Beads carry clonal barcode oligos (BC1-linker-BC2-linker-BC3-Read1). Super-loading multiple beads per droplet is resolved computationally by bap bead merging.
library_generation.product: droplet: [ tagmented nuclei ] + [ bead: BC1..TATGCATGAC..BC2..AGTCACTGAG..BC3-TCGTCGGCAGCGTC ] + PCR mix

library_generation.title: Droplet PCR — add bead cell barcode
library_generation.summary: Bead oligos are released and prime the transposed fragments, appending the bead barcode to the Read-1 end.
library_generation.note: The bead oligo 3' end (TCGTCGGCAGCGTC) anneals to the fragment's Read-1 adapter and extends; across PCR cycles different bead barcodes may re-write the same fragment, the basis of bap bead merging.

library_generation.title: Break emulsion and clean up
library_generation.summary: Droplets are broken and barcoded amplicons are purified with AMPure XP beads.
library_generation.note: Follows the initial 8-cycle barcoding PCR (37 C 30 min, 85 C 10 min, 72 C 5 min, then 8 cycles).

library_generation.title: Indexing PCR — add P5 and i7/P7
library_generation.summary: A final 7-9 cycle PCR with a P5 primer and an N7xx i7 index primer completes the sequenceable library.
library_generation.note: The N7xx primer (CAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGAT-[i7:8]-GTCTCGTGGGCTCGG) anneals to the Read-2 (s7) end and appends the 8-nt sample index + P7; a P5 primer completes the Read-1 end.

library_sequencing.primer: Custom SureCell Read 1 sequencing primer (proprietary; part of SureCell ATAC-Seq Library Prep Kit)
library_sequencing.note: Anneals just 3' of P5 and reads the composite bead cell barcode (BC1-const1-BC2-const2-BC3), then Nextera-R1 + ME into the genomic insert. In dsciATAC-seq the 6-nt Tn5 well barcode is additionally read between TCGTCGGCAGCGTC and AGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG.
library_sequencing.diagram:
Custom SureCell Read 1 primer
                5'-[binds P5-proximal]---------------------------------------------------------------->  read (118 nt)
top    5'-[P5][BC1][SPACER]TATGCATGAC[BC2]AGTCACTGAG[BC3]TCGTCGGCAGCGTCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG[gDNA]...-3'
                            ||||||||||     ||||||||||     ||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||
bot    3'-[P5][BC1][SPACER]ATACGTACTG[BC2]TCAGTGACTC[BC3]AGCAGCCGTCGCAGTCTACACATATTCTCTGTC[gDNA]...-5'
                            ←──────────── template (bottom strand) ────────────
 reads: BC1 · phase · const1 · BC2 · const2 · BC3 · NexteraR1(+Tn5 bc in dsci) · ME · genomic

library_sequencing.primer: i7 index sequencing primer (s7 / Nextera Read 2, GTCTCGTGGGCTCGG)
library_sequencing.note: Anneals to the s7 region on the top strand and reads the 8-nt i7 sample index added by the N7xx primer.
library_sequencing.diagram:
i7 index primer 5'-GTCTCGTGGGCTCGG-3'
                                                       ---------------------> read (8 nt)
top    5'-...CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTCCGAGCCCACGAGAC[i7':8]ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG-3'
              |||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||       ||||||||||||||||||||||||
bot    3'-...GACAGAGAATATGTGTAGAGGCTCGGGTGCTCTG[i7:8] TAGAGCATACGGCAGAAGACGAAC-5'
                                          template = top strand; reads i7'

library_sequencing.note: Anneals to the s7+ME region on the top strand and reads the paired genomic end of the fragment.
library_sequencing.diagram:
R2 primer 3'-GACAGAGAATATGTGTAGAGGCTCGGGTGCTCTG-5'
  read (40 nt) <-----------------------------------------
top    5'-...[gDNA]CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTCCGAGCCCACGAGAC[i7']...-3'
                   ||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||
bot    3'-...[gDNA]GACAGAGAATATGTGTAGAGGCTCGGGTGCTCTG[i7]...-5'
                   template = top strand; reads genomic (paired end)

title: dscATAC-seq (ddSEQ SureCell)
description: dscATAC-seq (Bio-Rad ddSEQ / SureCell ATAC-Seq) is a droplet-microfluidics single-cell ATAC-seq assay. Intact nuclei are first tagmented with Tn5 to insert Nextera adapters into regions of open chromatin, then co-encapsulated in droplets with PCR reagents and barcoded beads; droplet PCR appends a bead-specific cell barcode (three 7-bp barcode segments joined by fixed linker sequences) onto the Read-1 end of each transposed fragment. Read 1 captures the composite bead cell-barcode plus genomic DNA, Read 2 captures the paired genomic end, and an i7 index identifies the sample. In the higher-throughput combinatorial variant (dsciATAC-seq), Tn5 is additionally loaded with 6-bp barcoded Nextera Read-1 adapters (96 barcodes) so multiple barcoded cells can be super-loaded into each droplet.

publication.statistical_model: Double-truncated Poisson distribution (maximum-likelihood estimate of beads per droplet); Poisson probability density used to estimate droplet occupancy.

original_publication.title: Droplet-based combinatorial indexing for massive-scale single-cell chromatin accessibility

throughput.summary: 510,123 total single-cell chromatin-accessibility profiles across the study; dsciATAC-seq reaches ~25,000 cells per well (~100,000 cells per droplet device). Collision rate <2% (dscATAC-seq at 800-5,000 beads/uL) and <5% for dsciATAC-seq with 24 Tn5 barcodes.
throughput.cells: Mouse brain 46,653 cells; human BMMC 60,495 resting + 75,968 stimulated (136,463 passing filter); bead/FACS-isolated subsets 52,873; 274,144 species-mixing titration profiles.
throughput.dna: ~10^5 unique nuclear fragments per cell; median library size 165,204 reads and ~95% of fragments mapping to nuclear genome for GM12878.

other.label: Commercial kit
other.value: Bio-Rad SureCell ATAC-Seq Library Prep Kit (17004620) + SureCell ATAC-Seq Index Kit (12009360); ddSEQ Single-Cell Isolator (12004336)

other.label: Sequencer
other.value: Illumina NextSeq 550, NextSeq High Output (150 cycles); read protocol R1 118 / i7 8 / R2 40

other.label: Computational tool
other.value: bap (bead-based ATAC-seq processing) for bead merging via Jaccard index over Tn5 insertion sites; https://github.com/buenrostrolab/bap

data_processing.summary: Per-read composite bead barcodes are parsed and trimmed, genomic reads are aligned with BWA, then deduplicated with barcode awareness; the custom BAP tool merges bead barcodes that co-occur in a droplet by computing a Jaccard index over exact Tn5 insertion positions, with data-driven knee-calling to set per-library thresholds. Downstream, peaks are called and chromVAR 7-mer/TF-motif deviation scores drive Louvain clustering and t-SNE/UMAP embedding.
data_processing.statistical_model: Double-truncated Poisson (MLE for beads-per-droplet occupancy); Jaccard index for bead merging; two-sided permutation and binomial tests for differential chromatin accessibility
